evals.prompt: Add the Route entity with its DbContext mapping.
evals.expected_output: Creates Route in src/HikingLog.Domain/Entities/ with navigation to Stages. Adds DbSet<Route> to both HikingLogDbContext and IHikingLogDataContext. Creates RouteConfiguration implementing IEntityTypeConfiguration<Route>, registered via ApplyConfiguration in OnModelCreating. Notes the dotnet-ef-migration handoff.
assertions: Creates Route entity class in src/HikingLog.Domain/Entities/
Declares navigation property to Stages on the entity
Registers the configuration via ApplyConfiguration in OnModelCreating
Uses HasMaxLength on string columns and decimal(10,2) on decimal columns
XML doc <summary> on all types and members
Does NOT create commands, queries, or a controller

evals.prompt: Add the HikeLog entity. A HikeLog belongs to a Stage and has a Difficulty-free rating 1-5.
evals.expected_output: Creates HikeLog entity with StageId FK and Stage navigation. Adds DbSet to context and interface. HikeLogConfiguration defines the FK to Stage (child owns the relationship). Notes migration handoff.
assertions: HikeLog entity has StageId foreign key and Stage navigation property
HikeLogConfiguration defines HasOne(h => h.Stage).WithMany(...) — FK configured in the child's configuration
DbSet<HikeLog> added to both HikingLogDbContext and IHikingLogDataContext
